title: MPMRCL General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The latest Madhya Pradesh Metro Rail Corporation (MPMRCL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for General Manager posts! Published on 20 May 2026 at MPMRCL Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the Deputation: Max 58/60 years, Re-employment: 55 to 63 years, and Contract: Max 57 years age group and possessing a B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized university/institute can apply online from 22 May 2026 to 21 June 2026. Find all details about the MPMRCL General Manager new vacancy 2026, including eligibility,

age_limit.age_details: Deputation: Max 58/60 years. Re-employment: Min 55, Max 63 years. Contract: Max 57 years.
age_limit.details: Deputation: Maximum 58/60 years Re-employment: Minimum 55 years, Maximum 63 years Contract: Maximum 57 years

qualification.education_qualification: B. E. / B. Tech. in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized university / institute
qualification.details: B. E. / B. Tech. in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized university / institute

selection_process: Shortlisting Interview (Online or Offline) Written Test (if required) Medical Examination Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MPMRCL General Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPMRCL to complete the application.
